welcome:
Hello there!🌸 This is an anonymous message bot. 🎭 Send your link to friends or post it on your profile, and they can write to you anonymously. Rules of the game:
— Use /link to get your personal link. — Use /settings to manage privacy. — Use /pic to create a beautiful card. — You can reply to messages (one-off messages). — To chat without replying, click the 'Start Dialogue' button. Session lasts 5 minutes. — Use /lang to change the language. — Anonymization: your voices and video notes are automatically pitch-shifted. — AI Voice: type /voice [text]. — If someone spams: /block or /report.
settings_title: ⚙️ Privacy Settings Here you can manage what you want to receive from anonymous senders.
writing_to:
You are writing an anonymous message to {name} ✨
Session lasts {session_info}. Use /cancel to stop the dialogue. Use /help to see all features
writing_to_oneoff:
You are writing an anonymous message to {name} ✨
ℹ️ Auto-dialogue is off — this is a one-off message. Use /cancel to cancel. Use /help to see all features
donate_text: 📬 Support the development Hi! I develop this bot purely on enthusiasm and a desire to create a great product. Your donation will help pay for hosting and add new cool features. 💳 Monobank (Jar): 4874 1000 2299 4738 🔗 Direct link 🅿️ PayPal: Myshkode 🔗 PayPal link Even a small amount matters! Thank you for the support! ❤️
your_image_preview: 🎨 Here is the card I prepared for sending:
your_voice_preview: 🎧 This is how your message sounds:
draw_menu: 🎨 Card Settings You can change text position, color, or add/remove a dark box for better readability.
reply_received: You've got a reply to your anonymous message! ({name}) 👇
poll_voted: 🗳 Someone voted in your poll! Selected option №{options}
new_anonymous_msg: You've got a new anonymous message! ({name}) 👇
user_blocked: User blocked! 🚫 They won't be able to message you anymore.
report_sent: Report sent to moderators. Thank you! 🚩
msg_blocked: Unfortunately, you cannot write to this user. 😔
user_unblocked: User unblocked! ✅ Now they can write to you again.
user_disabled_messages: 🚫 This user has disabled anonymous messages.
user_disabled_media: 🚫 This user does not accept media messages (photos/videos/voice).

error.user_not_found: User not found or they blocked the bot.
error.no_reply_target: I don't know who to send this reply to. Try replying directly to the anonymous message.
error.no_text_voice: Please provide text after the command or reply to a text message. 🎤
error.no_target: I don't know who to send this to. Use a user's link. 👤
error.error_pic: ❌ Error generating image. Make sure you have templates in assets/templates/generated/
error.draw_instruction: 🎨 Please provide text for the card. You can also send a photo with this text as a caption or reply to another photo.
error.pic_instruction: 🎨 Please provide text for the card after the command (e.g.: /pic Love you!)
error.text_instruction: ✉️ Provide text after the command to send it as a plain message (e.g.: /text Hello!)
error.no_sender_found: ❌ Error: Could not find the sender of this message in the database.
error.error_voice: ❌ Error voicing. Please try again later.
error.unblock_not_blocked: ℹ️ This user was not blocked.
error.unblock_instruction: ❓ Provide ID from the list (e.g.: /unblock 1) or reply to a message.
error.session_expired: ❌ Error: session expired or data outdated.

admin.log_activated: ✅ Logs activated for this chat: {chat_id}{thread_info} Changes saved. Reports will be sent here.
